properties.name: Collins Playground
properties.note: Right next to school — quick/easy day or warm-up.

properties.name: Football Field
properties.note: Open turf; wide shots, motion, big sky. ~250 m south.

properties.name: Splaine Park
properties.note: Neighborhood park near the CVS; greenery + benches.

properties.name: Gallows Hill Park
properties.note: Hilltop park, open views; pairs with the skate park.

properties.name: Leslie's Retreat / Dog Park
properties.note: Riverside + dogs; ~17 min, very edge of the walk-shed — ambitious.

properties.name: Chestnut Street
properties.note: Among America's most photographed Federal-era streets; symmetry, doorways, brick.

properties.name: Warren Street
properties.note: Quiet historic residential block; gates, fences, facades.

properties.name: Ropes Mansion
properties.note: Georgian mansion + formal garden (the Hocus Pocus house).

properties.name: Broad Street Cemetery
properties.note: 1655 burying ground; slate stones, texture, raking light.

properties.name: Pickering House
properties.note: 1664 — among the oldest houses in the US still lived in.

properties.name: Friends Cemetery
properties.note: Small Quaker burial ground; calm, minimal, repetition.

properties.name: Salem Athenaeum & Botts Court
properties.note: Historic library + the narrow Botts Court alley.

properties.name: Proctor's Ledge Memorial
properties.note: 1692 witch-trial execution-site memorial; granite wall, somber. Off Pope St near Splaine.

properties.name: Skate Park (Gallows Hill)
properties.note: Concrete, rails, motion, graffiti texture — strong urban/action frames. Verify exact spot.

properties.name: Essex Street & Library
properties.note: Salem Public Library + the Essex St streetscape (not downtown).

properties.name: Mansell Playground
properties.note: Bonus spot near Gallows Hill (from OSM) — play structures, color.

properties.name: Salem Police Station
properties.note: Active commuter line runs ~30 m behind the station — best train-watching spot, plus police cars. Ask about a visit. Eastern edge of the walk-shed.

properties.name: Jefferson Ave trackside
properties.note: Scout: lots behind the businesses back onto the same rail corridor; ~10 min. Verify access/safety.
